text.title: Greenfield Infra Decision Matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.description: EKS picked because 'team likes it'; 6 months later, EKS doesn't match the scale curve.
antipattern.note: Fix: Build matrix retroactively. Score current platform. Decide migrate vs accept.

antipattern.description: EU customer requires data sovereignty; team chose US-only managed service.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply red-flag filter first. Disqualify US-only managed services. Re-score remaining candidates.

antipattern.description: Matrix scored after the decision was made; weights tuned to justify the chosen tool.
antipattern.note: Fix: Document weights before scoring. Use a facilitator who didn't pre-pick the answer.

antipattern.description: Decision record says 'EKS' with no reasoning; new engineer can't re-evaluate.
antipattern.note: Fix: Backfill rationale per cell. Include alternatives + why rejected.

antipattern.description: Decision record from 2022; cloud capabilities have changed; team on older tech than necessary.
antipattern.note: Fix: Schedule revisit. Re-score with current capabilities. Flag for migration if scores changed.
